purpose: Demarcate combat feats implemented during the SWSE Foundry v13/v2 feat implementation conversation. This addendum intentionally overrides older generated backlog statuses where those generated files still say implemented_partial or source_review_required.

statusPolicy.implemented_correct: Runtime behavior, normalization metadata, and action economy/rider semantics are represented in code.
statusPolicy.implemented_correct_with_manual_target_r: Core trigger/rider logic is implemented, but final target selection or table adjudication remains manual because the system does not yet own all grid/LOS decisions.
statusPolicy.implemented_correct_as_split_movement_ri: Feat is correctly represented as a movement/action rider, with token-movement UX left to the movement workflow/UI.

implementedFeats.name: Cleave
implementedFeats.implementation: Normalizes to cleaveExtraAttack reaction rule; HP-drop watcher and swse.damageApplied emit swse.cleaveAvailable; chat prompt/manual helper surfaces the extra attack.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Free immediate extra melee attack rider after qualifying melee drop-to-0 trigger; manual target selection remains required.

implementedFeats.name: Great Cleave
implementedFeats.implementation: Normalizes to EXTRA_ATTACK_LIMIT_OVERRIDE for cleaveExtraAttack and removes Cleave's once-per-round gate.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Same free Cleave rider; unlimited uses per round as long as each trigger qualifies.

implementedFeats.name: Frightening Cleave
implementedFeats.implementation: Normalizes to CLEAVE_RIDER_EFFECT; swse.cleaveUsed emits swse.frighteningCleaveAvailable and chat prompt.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Passive rider after Cleave use; eligible enemy/LOS selection remains GM/UI adjudicated.

implementedFeats.name: Combat Reflexes
implementedFeats.implementation: Normalizes to REACTION_CAPACITY_OVERRIDE and patches ActionEconomyPersistence.getReactionMax.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Passive reaction capacity increase: base reactions plus Dexterity modifier; also permits opportunity attacks while flat-footed.

implementedFeats.name: Power Attack
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION powerAttack plus two-handed and object/vehicle runtime edge cases.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Rides the selected melee attack action.

implementedFeats.name: Rapid Shot
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION rapidShot plus Strength-below-13 non-vehicle penalty correction.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Rides the selected ranged attack action; ammo is handled by AmmoSystem when applicable.

implementedFeats.name: Flurry
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION flurry; +2 melee attack when wielding only light weapons/lightsabers, with -5 Reflex rider until next turn.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Rides the selected melee attack action.

implementedFeats.name: Melee Defense
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION meleeDefense BAB-limited slider; converts selected melee attack penalty into Reflex dodge rider.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Rides the selected melee attack action.

implementedFeats.name: Rapid Strike
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION rapidStrike; -2 melee attack for +1 weapon die damage.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Rides the selected melee attack action.

implementedFeats.name: Careful Shot
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION carefulShot with Aim prerequisite support.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: If Aim is already present, rides the aimed attack; otherwise auto-spends Aim as two swift actions before the attack.

implementedFeats.name: Deadeye
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION deadeye with Aim prerequisite support.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: If Aim is already present, rides the aimed attack; otherwise auto-spends Aim as two swift actions before the attack.

implementedFeats.name: Burst Fire
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION burstFire; -5 attack, +2 weapon dice, autofire/ammo metadata.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Rides the selected ranged attack action; ammo cost is delegated to AmmoSystem.

implementedFeats.name: Powerful Charge
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION powerfulCharge with Charge prerequisite support.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: If Charge context already exists, rides the charge attack; otherwise auto-spends the Charge standard action before the attack.

implementedFeats.name: Charging Fire
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION chargingFire with Charge prerequisite support and ranged charge context.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: If Charge context already exists, rides the charge attack; otherwise auto-spends the Charge standard action before the ranged attack.

implementedFeats.name: Improved Disarm
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION improvedDisarm; disarm-only melee attack modifier and failed-counterattack suppression metadata.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Rides the selected disarm attack action.

implementedFeats.name: Mighty Swing
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION mightySwing; adds one weapon die to next melee attack.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Consumes two swift actions before the attack roll; rollback is supported if later roll/ammo flow fails.

implementedFeats.name: Running Attack
implementedFeats.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION runningAttack; marks splitMovementBeforeAfterAttack for movement workflow/UI.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Standard attack plus move rider; does not replace the attack action and does not auto-spend movement during the roll.

implementedFeats.name: Sniper
implementedFeats.implementation: Normalizes and patches ranged soft-cover suppression.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Passive roll-context modifier; no extra action cost.

implementedFeats.name: Dual Weapon Mastery I
implementedFeats.implementation: Normalizes DWM I and exposes dual-wield combat shape/penalty behavior.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Passive modifier to full-attack/two-weapon penalty; full attack economy is spent by FullAttackExecutor.

implementedFeats.name: Dual Weapon Mastery II
implementedFeats.implementation: Normalizes DWM II and exposes dual-wield combat shape/penalty behavior.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Passive modifier to full-attack/two-weapon penalty; full attack economy is spent by FullAttackExecutor.

implementedFeats.name: Dual Weapon Mastery III
implementedFeats.implementation: Normalizes DWM III and exposes dual-wield combat shape/penalty behavior.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Passive modifier to full-attack/two-weapon penalty; full attack economy is spent by FullAttackExecutor.

implementedFeats.name: Pistoleer
implementedFeats.implementation: Normalizes and patches pistol-specific accurate/inaccurate/hold-out blaster effects.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Passive roll-context weapon-quality/attack modifier; no extra action cost.

implementedFeats.name: Riflemaster
implementedFeats.implementation: Normalizes and patches rifle-specific accurate/brace/autofire/damage/size effects.
implementedFeats.actionEconomy: Passive roll-context weapon-quality/property modifier; no extra action cost.

notes: The generated backlog JSON files can be regenerated or patched in a separate scripted pass. This addendum is the authoritative manual demarcation for the conversation implementation pass.
Manual target resolution remains intentional for Cleave and Frightening Cleave because the current system does not yet own all legal target, reach, LOS, and enemy-selection decisions.
